message:
fix(dolt): prevent mergeJoinIter panic on type-filtered queries

When queries combine issue_type filters with other indexed predicates
(status, priority) in the same WHERE clause, Dolt's query optimizer may
select a merge join plan between index scans that panics in mergeJoinIter.

Fix by isolating type predicates in subqueries, forcing sequential
evaluation and preventing the problematic merge join plan. Applied to
SearchIssues (--type flag) and GetReadyWork (type filter).

Also adds idx_issues_issue_type index to schema with a migration path
for existing databases, giving the optimizer a direct index scan for
type-filtered queries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -79,6 +79,7 @@ CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS issues (
     defer_until DATETIME,
     INDEX idx_issues_status (status),
     INDEX idx_issues_priority (priority),
+    INDEX idx_issues_issue_type (issue_type),
     INDEX idx_issues_assignee (assignee),
     INDEX idx_issues_created_at (created_at),
     INDEX idx_issues_external_ref (external_ref)
